pi_items.source: https://bbbc.broadinstitute.org/BBBC006 defines camera pixel 6.45um, 20x mag, 2x binning, yielding 0.645 um/pixel. Task uses 0.65 as a rounded value.
export_result.sh and verifier.py check this path.

setup_task.sh downloads from data.broadinstitute.org/bbbc/BBBC005. BBBC website confirms BBBC005 is a synthetic dataset simulating BBBC006.
verifier.py allocates 15 points each for 4 file creations (60), 15 points for data completeness (columns and rows>10, metrics present), 10 points for consistency, and 15 points for VLM verification.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the Broad Bioimage Benchmark Collection (BBBC005) dataset, which consists of synthetic microscopy images generated by the SIMCEP tool to mimic BBBC006. The claimed pixel scale of 0.65 um/pixel accurately reflects the BBBC006 microscope parameters (6.45 um camera pixel size, 20x magnification, 2x binning yields exactly 0.645 um/pixel). The scoring breakdown in metadata contradicts the verifier.py implementation, which allocates 60 points for file existence instead of the claimed 35.
